messages.content:
Let me check the available test case files.Saya akan baca ketiga file test case ini.Berikut ringkasan lengkap test case yang ada untuk fitur **WhatsApp Web Outbound Anti-Ban Guard**:

---

## Ringkasan Test Case

| No | TC-ID | Skenario | Tipe | Prioritas | Coverage Area | Status Automation |
|---|-------|----------|------|-----------|---------------|------------------|
| 1 | **TC-WA-ABG-001** | Duplicate manual send via double click | E2E / Negative | **P0** | FR-001, FR-002, FR-012, FR-013, EH-001, EC-001 | ✅ Ready (Playwright) |
| 2 | **TC-WA-ABG-002** | Duplicate manual send dari dua tab | E2E / Edge | **P0** | FR-002, FR-013, EC-002 | ✅ Ready (Playwright) |
| 3 | **TC-WA-ABG-003** | Broadcast recipient overlap dedupe | Integration / E2E | **P0** | FR-002, FR-003, EC-003 | ⏳ Pending |
| 4 | **TC-WA-ABG-004** | Recipient-level locking (worker collision) | Integration / Concurrency | **P0** | FR-005, FR-006, EH-002, EC-011 | 🔧 Manual Only |
| 5 | **TC-WA-ABG-005** | Reconciliation pending on unknown status | Integration / Negative | **P0** | FR-008, FR-009, EH-003, EC-004 | 🔧 Manual Only |
| 6 | **TC-WA-ABG-006** | Reconciliation confirms already sent | Integration / Recovery | **P0** | FR-010, FR-011 | 🔧 Manual Only |
| 7 | **TC-WA-ABG-007** | Reconciliation confirms failed | Integration / Recovery | **P0** | FR-010, FR-011 | 🔧 Manual Only |
| 8 | **TC-WA-ABG-008** | Paste-heavy detection — Warning Mode | UI / E2E | **P0** | FR-014, FR-015, FR-017, FR-018, EC-006 | ⏳ Pending |
| 9 | **TC-WA-ABG-009** | Paste-heavy detection — Strict Mode | UI / E2E | **P0** | FR-014, FR-015, FR-017, FR-018, EH-004, EC-007 | ⏳ Pending |
| 10 | **TC-WA-ABG-010** | Cooldown enforcement | E2E / Negative | **P0** | FR-019, EH-005 | ⏳ Pending |
| 11 | **TC-WA-ABG-011** | Safe normal send path (no false positive) | E2E / Regression | **P1** | FR-016, FR-031, FR-033 | ✅ Ready (Playwright) |
| 12 | **TC-WA-ABG-012** | Sender safe mode on restriction | Integration / E2E | **P0** | FR-021, EH-006 | 🔧 Manual Only |
| 13 | **TC-WA-ABG-013** | Sender ineligible by outbound limit | Integration / Negative | **P1** | FR-021, FR-022, EH-007 | ⏳ Pending |
| 14 | **TC-WA-ABG-014** | Settings validation & safe fallback | API / UI | **P1** | FR-029, FR-030, EH-009 | ✅ Ready (Playwright) |
| 15 | **TC-WA-ABG-015** | Monitor-only mode (safe rollout) | E2E / Config | **P1** | FR-017, FR-029, EC-010 | ✅ Ready (Playwright) |
| 16 | **TC-WA-ABG-016** | Audit log visibility & privacy | UI / API | **P1** | FR-026, FR-027, FR-028, NFR-Security | ⏳ Pending |
| 17 | **TC-WA-ABG-017** | Stale lock recovery after worker crash | Integration / Recovery | **P1** | FR-007, EH-008, EC-008 | 🔧 Manual Only |
| 18 | **TC-WA-ABG-018** | Multipart partial-stop safety | Integration / E2E | **P1** | FR-024, FR-025 | 🔧 Manual Only |
| 19 | **TC-WA-ABG-019** | Sender stickiness in healthy session | E2E / Regression | **P1** | FR-023 | ⏳ Pending |
| 20 | **TC-WA-ABG-020** | Sender failover only on real ineligibility | Integration / E2E | **P1** | FR-021, FR-023, EC-009 | ⏳ Pending |
| 21 | **TC-WA-ABG-021** | Pre-send validation performance (≤100ms p95) | Performance | **P1** | NFR-Performance | 🔧 Manual/API |
| 22 | **TC-WA-ABG-022** | Safe degradation on audit persistence failure | Integration / Resilience | **P1** | NFR-Reliability, EH-010, EC-012 | 🔧 Manual Only |
| 23 | **TC-WA-ABG-023** | RBAC masking & Bahasa Indonesia UX | UI / API | **P1** | FR-031, NFR-Security/Localization | ✅ Ready (Playwright) |
| 24 | **TC-WA-ABG-024** | Cross-tenant isolation for logs & settings | API / UI | **P1** | NFR-Security | ⏳ Pending |

---

## Ringkasan Per Status

| Status | Jumlah | TC-ID |
|--------|--------|-------|
| ✅ **Ready (Playwright)** | **6** | 001, 002, 011, 014, 015, 023 |
| ⏳ **Pending (Playwright)** | **9** | 003, 008, 009, 010, 013, 016, 019, 020, 024 |
| 🔧 **Manual Only / Backend Harness** | **9** | 004, 005, 006, 007, 012, 017, 018, 021, 022 |

---

## Ringkasan Per Test Suite (TS)

| Suite ID | Nama Suite | Jumlah TC | Tujuan |
|----------|-----------|-----------|--------|
| **TS-001** | Duplicate Prevention Smoke | 3 (001-003) | Validasi no-duplicate pada double click, cross-tab, dan broadcast overlap |
| **TS-002** | Locking and Retry Safety | 5 (004-007, 017) | Concurrency, lock TTL, reconciliation, stale lock recovery |
| **TS-003** | Operator Risk Guard | 5 (008-011, 015) | Paste/burst detection, warning/strict/monitor-only mode, cooldown |
| **TS-004** | Sender Health Protection | 4 (012-013, 019-020) | Safe mode, ineligible sender, stickiness, failover |
| **TS-005** | Observability and Config | 4 (014, 016, 023-024) | Audit logs, settings validation, RBAC, tenant isolation, Bahasa UX |
| **TS-006** | Multipart and Performance | 3 (018, 021-022) | Partial-stop, validation latency, safe degradation |

---

## Prioritas Keseluruhan

- **P0 (Critical):** 10 TC — fokus pada duplicate prevention, locking, reconciliation, paste burst, cooldown, sender safe mode
- **P1 (High):** 14 TC — fokus pada sender eligibility, audit, RBAC, performance, resilience, multipart

---

**Sumber file:**
- `Test/whatsapp-web/wa-outbound-anti-ban-qa-test-spec.md` (dokumen test spec lengkap)
- `Test/whatsapp-web/wa-outbound-anti-ban-automation-mapping.md` (mapping automation Playwright)
- `Test/whatsapp-web/WhatsApp Web Outbound Anti-Ban Guard.tsv` (execution tracker spreadsheet)
